heading: Revenue and customs or tariff treatment of deep seabed mining unaffected
label: 1473 Revenue and customs or tariff treatment of deep seabed mining unaffected
text: Except as otherwise provided in sections 4495 to 4498 of title 26, nothing in this chapter shall affect the application of title 26. Nothing in this chapter shall affect the application of the customs or tariff laws of the United States.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 4495 to 4498 of title 26, referred to in text, were in the original “section 402”, meaning , title IV, , , which enacted sections 4495 to 4498 of Title 26, Internal Revenue Code, and enacted a provision set out as a note under . Sections 4495 to 4498 of title 26 were repealed by , , .section 402 of Pub. L. 96–28394 Stat. 582section 4495 of Title 26Pub.
